  1. io.papermc.paper.registry.data.dialog.action

Uses of Package
io.papermc.paper.registry.data.dialog.action

Packages that use io.papermc.paper.registry.data.dialog.action
Package
Description
io.papermc.paper.registry.data.dialog
 
io.papermc.paper.registry.data.dialog.action
This package contains classes related to dialog actions in the Paper API.
  • Classes in io.papermc.paper.registry.data.dialog.action used by io.papermc.paper.registry.data.dialog
    Class
    Description
    DialogAction
    Represents an action that can be performed in a dialog.
    DialogAction.CommandTemplateAction
    Represents an action that executes a command template.
    DialogAction.CustomClickAction
    Represents an action that executes a custom action with additional data.
    DialogAction.StaticAction
    Represents an action that performs a static click event.
    DialogActionCallback
    A callback for a dialog action.
  • Classes in io.papermc.paper.registry.data.dialog.action used by io.papermc.paper.registry.data.dialog.action
    Class
    Description
    DialogAction
    Represents an action that can be performed in a dialog.
    DialogAction.CommandTemplateAction
    Represents an action that executes a command template.
    DialogAction.CustomClickAction
    Represents an action that executes a custom action with additional data.
    DialogAction.StaticAction
    Represents an action that performs a static click event.
    DialogActionCallback
    A callback for a dialog action.
